info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  'jval hval hmal nam' ete DAtavaH upasargasya anupasTitO anena gaRasUtreRa vikalpena 'mitaH' (makAraH yezu itsaMjYakaH vidyate tAdfSAH) viDIyante  mittvasya PalaM tu mitAM hrasvaH 6.4.92 iti Ric-pratyaye pare aNgasya upaDAvarRasya hrasvAdeSaH - iti  yaTA jvalayati/jvAlayati - ityAdikam   atra prAptaviBAzA asti iti jYeyam yataH jval-hval-hmal-DAtUnAM vizaye tezAM GawAdigaRatvAt 1.933 GawAdayo mitaH ityanena taTA ca nam-DAtoH vizaye tasya amantatvAt 1.934 janIjFzknasuraYjo'mantASca ityanena pUrvaM nityaM mittve prApte anena gaRasUtreRa tat vikalpyate
